operator_setup_notes: This data source's modeling rule reads CEF-shaped columns (rt, src, dst, spt, dpt, cs1-6, act, etc.). Phantom emits CEF over syslog (`CEF:0|Forescout|ForeScoutCounterACT|...|<extensions>`) — the broker auto-extracts CEF k=v pairs into typed columns matching the CEF dictionary, and the broker routes to this dataset via the CEF header's vendor/product. Usually NO operator-side broker config is required beyond standard CEF ingestion.
